title: Simple Deepslate Instamine
description: Instamine deepslate with netherite Efficiency V pickaxe and Haste II effect.
body:
# Simple Deepslate Instamine

Allows players to mine deepslate instantly when using a netherite pickaxe enchanted with **Efficiency V** and having
**Haste II** active.

- Server-side (works in stingleplayer)
- No dependencies.
